content.json:
# 🛡️ Asset-Terminator — Operations
KPI, SLA compliance e drill-down per `requestId`. Sorgente: tabelle custom Log Analytics (`DecommissionRequests_CL`, `DecommissionActions_CL`, `GuardrailResults_CL`, `CallbackEvents_CL`).

content.query: DecommissionRequests_CL | where overallStatus_s in ("Completed","Failed","TimedOut","Blocked") | summarize requestCount = dcount(requestId_s) by overallStatus_s | order by requestCount desc
content.title: Richieste per stato

content.query: DecommissionRequests_CL | summarize requestCount = dcount(requestId_s) by deviceType_s | order by requestCount desc
content.title: Distribuzione per tipo dispositivo

content.query: DecommissionRequests_CL | where isnotempty(createdAt_t) and isnotempty(completedAt_t) | where overallStatus_s == "Completed" | extend completionMinutes = datetime_diff("minute", completedAt_t, createdAt_t) | summarize avgCompletionMinutes = avg(completionMinutes), p50Minutes = percentile(completionMinutes,50), p95Minutes = percentile(completionMinutes,95)
content.title: Tempo di completamento (min)

content.query: DecommissionActions_CL | where system_s in ("ActiveDirectory","ConfigMgr","Intune","EntraId") or target_s in ("ActiveDirectory","ConfigMgr","Intune","EntraId") | extend system = coalesce(system_s, target_s) | summarize totalActions = count(), failedActions = countif(status_s == "Failed") by system | extend failureRate = todouble(failedActions)/todouble(totalActions) | order by failureRate desc
content.title: Failure rate per sistema

content.query: DecommissionActions_CL | summarize totalRetries = sum(tolong(retryCount_d)), maxRetries = max(tolong(retryCount_d)), actions = count() by target_s, action_s | order by totalRetries desc
content.title: Retry per azione e target

content.query: DecommissionRequests_CL | where overallStatus_s in ("Completed","Failed","TimedOut","Blocked") | extend metSla = iff(isnotempty(dueAt_t) and isnotempty(completedAt_t), completedAt_t <= dueAt_t, slaState_s !in ("Breached","SlaBreached")) | summarize totalRequests = dcount(requestId_s), compliantRequests = dcountif(requestId_s, metSla) by assetCategory_s | extend complianceRate = todouble(compliantRequests)/todouble(totalRequests) | order by complianceRate asc
content.title: SLA compliance per categoria asset

content.query: DecommissionRequests_CL | where overallStatus_s !in ("Completed","Failed","TimedOut") | extend minutesUntilDue = datetime_diff("minute", dueAt_t, now()) | where slaState_s in ("AtRisk","Breached","SlaAtRisk","SlaBreached") or (isnotempty(dueAt_t) and dueAt_t <= now() + 4h) | project TimeGenerated, requestId_s, ticketNumber_s, assetId_s, assetCategory_s, overallStatus_s, slaState_s, dueAt_t, minutesUntilDue | order by dueAt_t asc
content.title: SLA a rischio / in violazione

content.query: GuardrailResults_CL | summarize evaluations = count(), failures = countif(result_s in ("Failed","Blocked")) by guardrailId_s, mandatory_b, overridable_b | extend failureRate = todouble(failures)/todouble(evaluations) | order by failures desc
content.title: Esiti guardrail

content.query: CallbackEvents_CL | summarize callbacks = count(), delivered = countif(status_s == "Delivered"), deadLettered = countif(deadLettered_b == true), retries = sum(tolong(retryCount_d)) by eventType_s | extend deliveryRate = todouble(delivered)/todouble(callbacks) | order by deadLettered desc, retries desc
content.title: Salute consegna callback
